title: Grow Up
description: Grow Up explores adding debuffs to dying as a challenge. By making you grow from small to big after dying!
body:
"GrowUp" Explores adding debuffs to dying as a challenge,

by making you "GrowUp" after meeting your demise

--- When dying in using this datapack you will immidiatly hear and see that your size is smaller and you now have debuffs that slowly will disapeer as you grow

If youre an admin or OP and dont want to be affected note that:

You can give yourself a score of 1 on the scoreboard "GrowUpAdmin" where you will mainly be getting the trigger command to turn on an off "GrowUpInvulnerable".
